'''Escape pod 4''' was an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Timespan]]''.

==History==
===Escape pod===
[[File:EscapePodFour_2.jpg|left|thumb|Diagram detailing the thrusters of escape pod 4]]

Escape pod 4 was used by [[Stuart Zissu]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[4B-X]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] to escape from the ''[[Timespan]]'' after it was boarded by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] looking for Zissu's father, [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Trux Zissu]]. The coordinates to [[Delantine]] which were supposed to be preprogrammed into the control system were not available. The [[Comm unit/Legends|comm transceiver]] was inactive and the automated controls did not work.

The escape pod ended up being pulled towards [[Da'nor]] because of gravity. The fuel ran out, forcing the crew to crash land on Da'nor. While entering the atmosphere, C-3PO, 4B-X, and Stuart managed to deploy an emergency parachute and wings to slow their descent.

===Sled===
Once the escape pod had crashed, R2-D2 removed a piece of the hull to be used as an equipment sled. The ground was covered in snow so the sled was easy to pull. In addition, the parachute was also packed for use as a blanket for Stuart.

[[File:EscapePodFour-Boat.jpg|left|thumb|The boat made from the hull of escape pod 4]]

===Boat===
Eventually the snow on Da'nor melted and the sled became too difficult to pull as the group was approaching a river. They were able to use the sled as a makeshift boat with paddles made from smaller pieces of scrap metal and poles made from branches.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Emergency in Escape Pod Four]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X]]''
